channel.title: git on hermanl0
channel.description: Recent content in git on hermanl0

item.title: adding ssh keys to github
item.description: adding ssh key to githhub SSH Setup: on your Ubuntu machine, generate a new SSH key pair by running the following command in your terminal: ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -C "your_email@example.com" once generated, add your new key to the ssh-agent: eval "$(ssh-agent -s)" ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_rsa copy your SSH public key: cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub add key to github clone the repository with the command: git clone git@github.uio.no:YourUserName/YourRepoName.git replace “YourUserName/YourRepoName.git” with your Github username and the repository name.
item.content:encoded:
adding ssh key to githhub

SSH Setup:

on your Ubuntu machine, generate a new SSH key pair by running the following command in your terminal:

ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -C "your_email@example.com"

once generated, add your new key to the ssh-agent:

eval "$(ssh-agent -s)"
ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_rsa

copy your SSH public key:

cat ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub

add key to github

clone the repository with the command:

git clone git@github.uio.no:YourUserName/YourRepoName.git

replace “YourUserName/YourRepoName.git” with your Github username and the repository name.
